description: Periodically afflicts enemies around the Siphoner's target so they take amplified damage from all sources.
tooltipTemplate: Every {cooldownSeconds:1}s the Siphoner amplifies enemies within {radius:0} of its current foe. Afflicted enemies take {damageTakenMultiplier+%} damage from all sources for {durationSeconds:1}s.

description: Siphon Life chains to additional nearby enemies for reduced damage and healing.
tooltipTemplate: Siphon Life arcs to up to {additionalTargetCount:0} additional enemies within {chainRange:0}. Secondary beams deal {secondaryDamageMultiplier%} damage and produce {secondaryHealingMultiplier%} healing.

description: Excess Siphon Life healing converts to a persistent shield on the Siphoner, then on a nearby ally.
tooltipTemplate: {shieldConversionPercent%} of excess Siphon Life healing converts to shielding. Fills the Siphoner's pool (cap {maxSelfShield:0}), then overflows to a nearby ally within {allyRadius:0} (cap {maxAllyShield:0} per ally). Shields persist until depleted.

description: A portion of Siphon Life damage echoes to every nearby enemy.
tooltipTemplate: Siphon Life damage echoes for {damageSharePercent%} to every other visible enemy within {radius:0} of the primary target.
